name: meridian
description: Markdown-first Paper Wiki and Lab idea-graph copilot for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup Meridian, use Paper Wiki, and manage Lab idea graphs.
interface.longDescription: Meridian exposes three user-facing skills: meridian for setup and migration, wiki for Paper Wiki update/use workflows, and lab for wiki-grounded idea graphs with approach trees, experiments, evidence, handoffs, and local findings.
defaultPrompt: Check my Meridian setup and migrate anything out of date.
Ingest this paper into my Paper Wiki.
Use my Paper Wiki to answer this research question.
Use Lab to place this idea, ground it in my Paper Wiki, and prepare the next evidence step.
